description: §18.10 — a value-form `match` arm carrying a guard CONDITION (`.Admin | p.active :> ...`, i.e. a `| cond` boolean guard, distinct from `| .Variant` pattern alternation) SHALL fire E-SYNTAX-011: arm guard clauses are not supported in v1. Regression guard: `| cond` / `if cond` guards must be rejected so the condition is moved into an `if` inside the arm body.
rationale: §18.10: match arm guard clauses (`| cond` or `if cond`) are not supported in v1 (E-SYNTAX-011). Resolution: use a plain pattern and move the condition into an `if` inside the arm body.
